preview_text:
The model favors Ivory Coast at 64%, but assigns Curaçao a meaningful 12% chance of victory. The underdog's probability is more than four times larger in the model's assessment than in the sportsbook consensus, which rates Curaçao at only 5%.

The model's spread reflects a moderately competitive match. A draw carries a plausible 25% probability, suggesting the teams could finish level in regular time. Ivory Coast is the clear favorite, but the model does not treat this as a heavily lopsided contest—Curaçao retains genuine upside relative to the market's view.

The sportsbook and Polymarket consensus align tightly with each other, both placing Ivory Coast near 83% and drawing at roughly 11%. Both diverge sharply from the model on Curaçao's chances, which the model rates 7 percentage points higher. The dashboard does not determine which source better reflects true match conditions; the gap merits attention from users interpreting the forecast.
